# terrible_community_general_scaleway_compute_private_network (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `compute_id` (String) ID of the compute instance (see `community.general.scaleway_compute`).
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `private_network_id` (String) ID of the private network (see `community.general.scaleway_private_network`).
- `project` (String) Project identifier.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example `par1`).

### Optional

- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the VPC.

### Read-Only

- `scaleway_compute_private_network` (String) Information on the VPC.
